label: Transparent pond skater motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous Pond Skater transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated pond skater shadow motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single pond skater insect seen in a graceful top-down three-quarter view with accurate long thin legs, small dark body, delicate antennae, ink-black silhouette detail, subtle water-blue rim highlights, faint reed-green reflected accents on the legs, and the visual idea of its crisp shadow hovering above still pond water, but without showing an environment or water surface. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full insect body, antennae, and all six long legs without cropping; crisp edges suitable for alpha removal. Lighting/mood: clean studio lighting that preserves the ink-black body, water-blue glints, and reed-green accents; balanced interface-system mood, calm and precise. Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second insect, no flowers, no large water scene, no cast shadow on the background, no contact shadow, no reflection, no cropped legs.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Pond Skater light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent pond skater motif is the source reference for palette, texture, contrast, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Pond Skater", derived from the visible transparent pond skater shadow cutout. This must be a finished source board, not a thumbnail. Canvas and output requirement: exact 16:9 landscape design board at 3840 x 2160 pixels. Use the full canvas. Do not create a small board inside margins. Keep all labels large, crisp, and readable at gallery preview scale. Required visible sections: Morphous Pond Skater, Pond Skater, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from ink-black insect body, glassy water-blue rim highlights, reed-green leg reflections, silver meniscus glints, pale pond-surface neutrals, and a calm garden-pond shadow. The system should feel balanced, precise, and usable for product interfaces. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, charts, forms, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture swatches, token rows, and simple product icons. Typography: include English product UI examples and Japanese typography examples with Noto Sans JP guidance; keep text short and readable. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style balanced interface system, precise grid, calm white and pale water surfaces, maximum radius 8px, thin ink-black outlines, blue meniscus focus rings, reed-green secondary states, subtle ripple-line texture, crisp table density, and quiet dashboard layout. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, beige-heavy palettes, and one-note blue UI. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pond Skater" or "Pond Skater", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Pond Skater dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent pond skater motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode Morphous Pond Skater board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named exactly "Morphous Pond Skater". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible pond skater cutout. Canvas and output requirement: exact 16:9 landscape design board at 3840 x 2160 pixels. Use the full canvas. Do not create a small board inside margins. Keep all labels large, crisp, and readable at gallery preview scale. Required visible sections: Morphous Pond Skater, Pond Skater, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Preserve the light board's precise grid, UI coverage, compact navigation, table density, forms, status panels, token rows, spacing/radius/shadow samples, and ripple texture language. Translate the palette to dark mode using ink-black and deep-water surfaces, water-blue focus rings, reed-green secondary states, silver meniscus text highlights, and muted pond-surface neutrals. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, charts, forms, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture swatches, token rows, and simple product icons. Typography: include English product UI examples and Japanese typography examples with Noto Sans JP guidance; keep text short and readable. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style balanced interface system, maximum radius 8px, luminous blue meniscus focus, reed-green success and secondary states, thin silver borders, dark water panels, ink-wash texture, subtle ripple-line overlays, clean dashboard/data density, and restrained contrast. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no pure flat black background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Pond Skater" or "Pond Skater", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
